title: BEM-1198 release validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_release_decision.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_PROOFS = {
    "telegram": ("governance/proofs/external/telegram/production_receipt.json", "governance/validators/validate_telegram_production_receipt.py"),
    "runtime": ("governance/proofs/external/runtime/live_runtime_receipt.json", "governance/validators/validate_live_runtime_receipt.py"),
    "claude": ("governance/proofs/external/claude/external_claude_audit_result.json", "governance/validators/validate_external_claude_audit_result.py"),
}


def validate_decision():
    errors = []
    for proof_id, (proof_path, validator_path) in REQUIRED_PROOFS.items():
        if not Path(proof_path).exists():
            errors.append(f"missing required proof: {proof_id} -> {proof_path}")
        if not Path(validator_path).exists():
            errors.append(f"missing validator: {proof_id} -> {validator_path}")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate_decision()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS release_decision")
